purpose: This is a utility library for populating database tables with data from JSON files, supporting both Microsoft SQL Server and PostgreSQL databases.
businessFeatures: JSON-to-database row insertion with automatic parameter handling
Support for clearing records from tables based on JSON data
Type conversion handling for various database types
Specialized handling for PostgreSQL-specific types (arrays, enums)

apis.purpose: Inserts data from JSON into database tables
Deletes all data from tables specified in the JSON
Deletes specific records from tables matching the JSON data

dataEntities.name: No specific data entities - this is a generic tool that works with any table schema

findings.description: The PostgreSQL implementation includes special handling for PostgreSQL-specific types (enums, arrays) that are not present in the SQL Server implementation
